@graph.name: Amelia Aesthetics Raleigh, NC
@graph.description: Plastic surgery in Raleigh, NC at Amelia Aesthetics. Meet the surgeons, explore procedures, review practice information, and book a consultation.

potentialAction.name: Book a consultation at Amelia Raleigh

mainEntity.name: Do you offer financing options for plastic surgery and medspa treatments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Amelia Aesthetics in Raleigh works with reputable third-party financing partners to help make treatment more accessible. Financing options and payment plans can be discussed during your consultation, and our team is happy to walk you through what may be available based on your treatment plan and individual needs.

mainEntity.name: How much do procedures typically cost at Amelia Raleigh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because every treatment plan is personalized, pricing varies based on your procedure and surgical plan. To get an idea of what your procedure might cost, you can view pricing for medspa and surgical procedures at AskAmelia.com/pricing. During your consultation, you’ll receive a finalized quote that includes all anesthesia, OR, and surgeon fees, so there are no surprises.

mainEntity.name: How do I book a consultation at Amelia Raleigh?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can easily book your surgical consultation or medspa treatment online at AskAmelia.com/book. If you have additional questions, you can always reach out to our team at patientcare@askamelia.com or (919) 785-1220.

mainEntity.name: Who are the plastic surgeons at Amelia Aesthetics in Raleigh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amelia Raleigh is home to Dr. Jeremy Pyle, Dr. Michelle Roughton, Dr. Cedric Hunter, Dr. Aspinder Singh, and Dr. Trace Browne. Each surgeon is fully trained in aesthetic plastic surgery and provides personalized surgical care focused on safety, natural-looking results, and long-term confidence.

mainEntity.name: Is the operating room at Amelia Raleigh accredited?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All surgical procedures are performed in an on-site, state-of-the-art outpatient operating room accredited by the American Association for Accreditation of Ambulatory Surgery Facilities (AAAASF). This accreditation ensures rigorous national standards for anesthesia safety, infection prevention, emergency preparedness, and patient monitoring.

mainEntity.name: What surgical procedures are offered at Amelia Raleigh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Patients commonly seek breast and body procedures such as breast augmentation, breast reduction, breast lifts, deep plane facelift and neck lifts, rhinoplasty, mommy makeover, drainless tummy tuck, body contouring after weight loss, and revision surgery.

mainEntity.name: Does Amelia Raleigh have a medspa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Amelia Raleigh includes a full-service medical spa offering Botox and other wrinkle relaxers, dermal fillers, skin rejuvenation treatments, facials, and medical-grade skincare, all provided by licensed professionals under physician supervision.

mainEntity.name: What makes Amelia Aesthetics different from other plastic surgery practices in the Triangle?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amelia Aesthetics combines advanced medical care with a patient-first philosophy, focusing on long-term results rather than short-term trends. That means honest recommendations, transparent education and pricing, accredited surgical facilities, and coordinated surgical and medspa care.

mainEntity.name: Where is Amelia Raleigh located?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amelia Aesthetics is conveniently located at 2304 Wesvill Court, Suite 360, Raleigh, NC, serving patients from across the greater Triangle. The practice is easy to access and designed to provide a comfortable, private, and welcoming environment for both surgical and medspa patients.

mainEntity.name: What are Amelia Raleigh’s hours?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amelia Raleigh is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 am to 5:00 pm.

mainEntity.name: Can I bring someone or kids to my consultation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! You are welcome to bring someone and children with you to your consultation.

mainEntity.name: What forms of payment does Amelia Raleigh accept?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amelia Raleigh accepts credit, debit, cash, cashier’s and personal checks, Apple Pay, Care Credit, and Alphaeon.

mainEntity.name: Is on-site parking available?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Amelia Raleigh has free on-site parking.

mainEntity.name: How is patient safety prioritized at Amelia Raleigh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Patient safety is supported through AAAASF-accredited operating rooms, board-certified and board-eligible plastic surgeons, licensed anesthesia providers, and strict clinical protocols for infection control, monitoring, and recovery. Safety is considered at every stage of care, from consultation through follow-up.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer treatment plans for long-term aesthetic care?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Many patients choose to combine surgical procedures with ongoing medspa treatments and skincare to maintain and enhance their results over time. Your providers can help build a long-term care plan that evolves with your needs and goals.
